revision.comment: [[WP:BANREVERT]]; per request
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[Coming of Age Day]] * [[National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[Shōwa Day]] * [[Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[Greenery Day]] * [[Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[Tango no sekku]]) * ([[Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[Culture Day]] * [[Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing last templates I do not have
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[Coming of Age Day]] * [[National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[Shōwa Day]] * [[Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[Greenery Day]] * [[Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[Tango no sekku]]) * ([[Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[Culture Day]] * [[Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[Coming of Age Day]] * [[National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[Shōwa Day]] * [[Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[Greenery Day]] * [[Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[Tango no sekku]]) * ([[Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[Culture Day]] * [[Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Template:Public holidays in Japan]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Template" to "Category:"

revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[:en:The Emperor's Birthday|The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[:en:Vernal Equinox Day|Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Shōwa Day|Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[:en:Tango no sekku|Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[:en:Respect for the Aged Day|Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[:en:Silver Week|Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[:en:The Emperor's Birthday|The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[:en:Vernal Equinox Day|Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Shōwa Day|Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[:en:Tango no sekku|Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[:en:Respect for the Aged Day|Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[:en:Silver Week|Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[:en:The Emperor's Birthday|The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[:en:Vernal Equinox Day|Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Shōwa Day|Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[:en:Tango no sekku|Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[:en:Respect for the Aged Day|Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[:en:Silver Week|Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[:en:The Emperor's Birthday|The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[:en:Vernal Equinox Day|Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Shōwa Day|Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[:en:Tango no sekku|Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[:en:Respect for the Aged Day|Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[:en:Silver Week|Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Public holidays in Japan | title = {{flagicon|JPN}} [[:en:Public holidays in Japan|Public holidays in Japan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|background-color: #ddf;}}} |list1 = * [[:en:New Year's Day|New Year's Day]] ([[Japanese New Year]]) * [[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] * [[:en:National Foundation Day (Japan)|National Foundation Day]] * [[:en:The Emperor's Birthday|The Emperor's Birthday]] * [[:en:Vernal Equinox Day|Vernal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Shōwa Day|Shōwa Day]] * [[:en:Constitution Memorial Day|Constitution Memorial Day]] * [[:en:Greenery Day|Greenery Day]] * [[:en:Children's Day (Japan)|Children's Day]] ([[:en:Tango no sekku|Tango no sekku]]) * ([[:en:Okinawa Memorial Day|Okinawa Memorial Day]]) * [[:en:Marine Day|Marine Day]] * [[Mountain Day#Mountain Day in Japan|Mountain Day]] * [[:en:Respect for the Aged Day|Respect for the Aged Day]] * [[:en:Autumnal Equinox Day|Autumnal Equinox Day]] * [[:en:Sports Day (Japan)|Sports Day]] * [[:en:Culture Day|Culture Day]] * [[:en:Labor Thanksgiving Day|Labor Thanksgiving Day]] |belowclass = hlist |below = * [[:en:Golden Week (Japan)|Golden Week (Japan)]] * [[:en:Silver Week|Silver Week]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{Navboxes |list= {{Asia topic|Template:Public holidays in}} }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Holiday navigational boxes|Japan]] [[Category:Public holidays in Japan]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
